channel.title: French Space Agency on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in French Space Agency on Alien Truth Social

item.title: GEIPAN: Study and Information Group on Unidentified Aerospace Phenomena
item.description:
GEIPAN, the Unidentified Aerospace Phenomena Research and Information Group, is a unit of the French space agency CNES. Founded in 1977 as GEPAN, it has undergone several name changes and is dedicated to investigating unidentified aerospace phenomena and making its findings public. The organization’s mission includes drawing on data from reports, including those channeled by the French Gendarmerie, and utilizing CNES’s technical resources for scientific investigation. GEIPAN began making its archives available online in March 2007, and recent reports estimate that around 3% of sightings remain unidentified.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/GEIPAN
